// description: Maps each logical Android signing key (the GitHub-secret prefix ANDROID_KEYSTORE_<name>_BASE64 / _PASS / optional _ALIAS) to the .user store folder(s) it materializes into. Connect shares one key across both of its store folders. The key ALIAS is NOT stored here — it is auto-detected from the keystore (or supplied via the optional _ALIAS secret) at materialize time.
